title: Eugene's Guan Dao
description: A powerful weapon from ancient China.
body:
This is originally for mudpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!

---
### install along with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) for the best experience.

Guan Dao is a famous weapon from ancient China. It is most recognized for its curved blade with a pronounced hook and scalloped spine. It primarily served as a cavalry weapon and was unsuited for the foot soldier. Today, it is most often associated with the legendary weapon of Guan Yu in the historical novel, *Romance of the Three Kingdoms*.[[1]](https://swordencyclopedia.com/guandao/)

Now you can use this powerful weapon in Minecraft! If you use it while riding a horse, the enemy hit by you will suffer from slowness and weakness for seconds.

Speical thanks to [Heket_White](https://space.bilibili.com/1754762250) for the technical support!

[[1]Guandao: Its History, Myth, and Martial Arts Use](https://swordencyclopedia.com/guandao/)
